description: Legal document written under the authority of Nathaniel ha-Levi concernning payment of fees for an orphan preparing himself for the profession of his late father, Manṣūr b. Khalaf (known as Ibn al-Muṭrī). His mother Mulūk, widow of Khalaf the cantor, wants Manṣūr to be taught Torah by Abū Saʿd Saʿadya the cantor (known as Ibn al-Muʿallima, ‘the son of the female teacher’) b. Avraham. Fustat, Adar 1471/February-March 1160.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בסמכות נתנאל הלוי. מנצור בן חלף (אבן אל-מוטרי) ייתום ילמד תורה מסעדיה החזן. פוסטאט, פברואר–מרץ 1160.
